gh release view and git ls-remote succeeded outside the Codex sandbox

install_choices.name: github_release_wheel
install_choices.note: Use after the v1.0.1 release assets are attached and the URL is publicly reachable.

install_choices.name: source_checkout_editable
install_choices.note: This matches the README quickstart and works from a repository clone.

install_choices.name: source_distribution
install_choices.note: Known P3 follow-up: smoke the sdist independently in a clean venv before publishing beyond GitHub assets.

concise_user_path: Install with Python >=3.11, preferably from the v1.0.1 wheel.
Review demo/docs_export.md, demo/security_boundary_report.md, demo/reproducibility_pack.md, and demo/promotion_checklist.md before sharing outputs.
Adapt only local CSV/JSON inputs from human-reviewed records; do not add broker credentials, account numbers, secrets, or private personal data to public examples.

safety_boundaries.summary: Static local scenario review only. No live market data, broker connection, order execution, prediction, portfolio optimization, tax advice, legal advice, investment advice, or buy/sell/hold recommendation.
safety_boundaries.exact_generated_boundary: Static local assumptions only; no live data, broker API, orders, predictions, portfolio optimization, tax/legal/investment advice, or buy/sell/hold recommendations.
promotion_constraints: Do not imply personalized suitability analysis.
Describe rankings, estimates, and risk flags as deterministic prompts from bundled or user-supplied assumptions.

verification_commands.name: selfcheck
verification_commands.evidence: JSON status pass, version 1.0.1, no errors

verification_commands.name: public_scan
verification_commands.evidence: 65 files scanned; no secret marker findings; finance boundary present

known_follow_ups.action: Preserve no-live-data, no-broker, no-advice, and no-recommendation language in release notes, screenshots, and promotion copy.
Run an external secret scanner such as gitleaks or trufflehog, including git history if private data may ever have been committed.
Attach manual wheel smoke evidence to the public release.
State clearly that wheel installation requires attached release assets or a package index, while source checkout uses pip install -e .
Use only the final local wheel hash recorded in this note for v1.0.1 evidence.
Regenerate demo/release_manifest.json after the final commit if release owners want the new docs artifacts included.
Smoke the sdist in a clean venv before publishing beyond GitHub assets.
Consider future docs-only grouping for first-run, analysis, and release-owner commands.
Treat demo/release_manifest.json as broad hash inventory and demo/visual_receipt.json as selected visual evidence only.
Add a manual browser screenshot if promotion requires rendered showcase proof.
Document that built-in public-scan is intentionally simple and does not replace entropy or git-history secret scanning.
